div.p: Instant translations between English, Ukrainian, and Greek — powered by neural machine translation. Save any result directly to your personal vocabulary.

div.class: lx-lang-bar d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap

div.span: Save this translation to your vocabulary?

div.a: 🔐 Sign in to save to vocabulary

div.div: Hit "Add to Vocabulary" to keep the word in your personal list with the translation already filled in.
Press Ctrl + Enter to translate instantly without reaching for the button.
Click the swap arrows to instantly reverse the translation direction and re-translate.
